data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interfaces are designed to minimize execution time for point-and-click interactions.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifying navigation by minimizing choices to reduce user decision time.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Utilizes visual grouping for intuitive navigation.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design leverages user familiarity to provide an intuitive experience.
data.technical_spec: Common patterns, recognizability in UI elements.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Information is chunked into easier-to-process groups for better cognition.
